docs.name: Macbook Mock
docs.description: Faux MacBook frame with a hover-driven lid open and a fade-or-flap screen reveal. Hover to lift the lid; the idle screen crossfades or folds back to expose your image or React node.

props.name: size
props.description: Outer width and lid height. Defaults to "md" (320px wide).

props.name: tint
props.description: Chassis colourway. Affects lid, base, keyboard, trackpad, hinge, and ports.

props.name: screenIdleClassName
props.description: Tailwind classes for the solid screen fill shown when the lid is closed.

props.name: revealSrc
props.description: Image URL revealed on hover. Ignored when `screenContent` is set.

props.name: revealAlt
props.description: Alt text for the reveal image.

props.name: screenContent
props.description: Render any node inside the screen instead of an image — UI mock, video, gradient, etc.

props.name: revealMode
props.description: How the idle layer gives way: a crossfade or a 3D fold of the top half.

props.name: open
props.description: Force the lid open without hover. Combine with `hoverDisabled` for a static mockup.

props.name: hoverDisabled
props.description: Ignore hover entirely; only the `open` prop controls the lid.

props.name: className
props.description: Classes merged onto the outer wrapper.

docs.overview: MacbookMock renders a minimal laptop frame whose lid pops open on hover, exposing a screen layer that either crossfades or flaps to a custom image or React node. The chassis is built from layered divs — no extra assets needed. Choose a tint, pass `revealSrc` for an image, or `screenContent` for any React node.

scenarios.title: Default hover reveal
scenarios.description: Drop in the component with a custom image — hovering opens the lid and crossfades from the dark idle screen to your photo.

scenarios.title: Flap reveal in midnight tint
scenarios.description: Set revealMode to flap so the top half of the idle layer folds back in 3D. Pair with the midnight tint for a darker chassis.

scenarios.title: Custom screen content
scenarios.description: Pass screenContent to render any React node inside the display — a UI mock, gradient, or short video — instead of an image.

scenarios.title: Always-open static mockup
scenarios.description: Force the lid open and disable hover so it works as a static landing-page asset.

accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Decorative device mockup; wrap with aria-hidden when used for illustration only.
